mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TASK_LOG ( LOG_ID, TASK_ID, USER_ID, ACTION_TYPE, BEFORE_STATUS, AFTER_STATUS, CREATED_DATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_TASK_LOG.NEXTVAL, #{taskId}, #{userId}, #{actionType}, #{beforeStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{afterStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT LOG_ID AS logId, TASK_ID AS taskId, USER_ID AS userId, ACTION_TYPE AS actionType, BEFORE_STATUS AS beforeStatus, AFTER_STATUS AS afterStatus, CREATED_DATE AS createdDate FROM TASK_LOG WHERE TASK_ID = #{taskId} ORDER BY CREATED_DATE DESC
